reference: A blood sugar level of thirty-five is low, not high. He needs to be evaluated for such a low level of sugar. Your doctor must have told you what was wrong with the child. Again, thirty-five is low sugar, not high.
text: A blood sugar level of 35 is low, not high. He needs to be evaluated for such a low level of sugar; your doctor must have told you what was wrong with the child. Again, 35 is low sugar, not high.
